tool_args.label: Penn Station Access Project Update
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North has been working hard on advancing Penn Station access, which will bring Metro-North New Haven line service to Penn Station and add four new stations to the East Bronx.

payload.description: Metro-North has been working hard on advancing Penn Station access, which will bring Metro-North New Haven line service to Penn Station and add four new stations to the East Bronx. This new service is a game changer for Bronx residents and for Metro-North customers in Westchester and Connecticut, who will have direct access to the West Side – saving up to 40 minutes per day.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North has been working hard on advancing Penn Station access, which will bring Metro-North New Haven line service to Penn Station and add four new stations to the East Bronx.

tool_args.label: NYSDOT CMAQ Grant for Connecting Services
tool_args.raw_text: To obtain MTA Board approval to enter into a contract to accept up to $365,000 in a Congestion Mitigation/Air Quality (CMAQ) grant from the New York State Department of Transportation (NYSDOT) to support connecting services, covering the period from January 1, 2022 through December 31, 2022.

payload.description: Metro-North to accept up to $365,000 in CMAQ grant from NYSDOT to support connecting services including connecting buses (Hudson Link, Newburgh-Beacon Shuttle, Dutchess LOOP, HART, etc.), the Haverstraw-Ossining Ferry, the Newburgh-Beacon Ferry and Guaranteed Ride Home programs.

evidence_refs.source_quote: PURPOSE: To obtain MTA Board approval to enter into a contract to accept up to $365,000 in a Congestion Mitigation/Air Quality (CMAQ) grant from the New York State Department of Transportation (NYSDOT) to support connecting services, covering the period from January 1, 2022 through December 31, 2022.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: LIRR December 2021 total ridership vs Dec 2020
tool_args.raw_text: Total ridership increased +97.2% compared to December 2020 (3,668,045 passengers in December 2021 vs. 1,860,130 passengers in December 2020).

tool_args.label: LIRR Dec 2021 ridership vs Dec 2019
tool_args.raw_text: Compared to December 2019, total ridership decreased -52.2% (3,668,045 passengers in December 2021 vs. 7,667,200 passengers in December 2019).
